Id1.text: Originating in the United States and by Americans, some of African decent is the ALV X-1.

Id2.text: ALV X-1 comes from the US where Americans live and African Americans are an ethnic group.

Id3.text: The country of origin of the ALV X-1 is the United States, home to Americans and where African Americans are an ethnic group.
